content: Planning required 2 iterations because gap-cycle-1 found 22 gaps spanning all 3 hunter categories, and 16 of those 22 mapped to planning-phase artifacts (roster, routing, test plan). The planning coordinator successfully addressed all 16 in a single re-entry cycle, showing that planning re-entry is efficient when gaps are clearly attributed to planning outputs.
sourceEvidence: iteration: 2. summary: '16 of 22 gap-report items addressed in planning pass.' childResults: roster-planner=planned, routing-planner=planned, test-planner=planned.

history.reason: Cold start — first observation from initial factory run
